articles.title: Australian Grand Prix final predictions and odds
articles.summary: Australian Grand Prix final predictions and odds. Our expert betting writers make their last-minute predictions before lights out in Melbourne.

articles.summary: Australian Grand Prix short-form betting tips. Our expert betting writers provide their tips for the major Australian Grand Prix betting markets.

articles.title: How Melbourne snatched the Australian GP from Adelaide
articles.summary: How Melbourne snatched the Australian GP from Adelaide. Not many countries can boast hosting the finale Grand Prix of one season, and the opening one the next, but that’s exactly what happened in Australia in 1996, as F1 Hall of Fame journalist David Tremayne explains.

articles.title: Bet Builder tips for Australian Grand Prix selected
articles.summary: Bet Builder tips for Australian Grand Prix selected. We’ve assessed the betting markets and made our Bet Builder selections for the Australian Grand Prix.

articles.title: Qualifying proved Aston Martin's ‘potential is huge’ – Alonso
articles.summary: Qualifying proved Aston Martin's ‘potential is huge’ – Alonso. Fernando Alonso was energised by the step forward made by Aston Martin during Qualifying for the Australian Grand Prix as he came close to progressing to Q2, suggesting early signs of improvement.

articles.title: Sainz reveals reason for Qualifying no-show
articles.summary: Sainz reveals reason for Qualifying no-show. Carlos Sainz was frustrated after he endured more disrupted running on Saturday, missing out on Qualifying entirely to leave him to start the Australian Grand Prix with significantly less running than his competitors.

articles.title: Lindblad ‘extremely happy’ with first F1 Qualifying
articles.summary: Lindblad ‘extremely happy’ with first F1 Qualifying. Arvid Lindblad was left “extremely happy” after securing P9 in his first-ever F1 Qualifying session, with the rookie admitting that he “knew coming into the session that we were fast” as both Racing Bulls cars reached the top 10 in Australia.

articles.title: What are the tactical options for the Australian GP?
articles.summary: What are the tactical options for the Australian GP?. Matt Youson takes a look at the different pit stop and tyre options that are available to the teams for the season opener at the Albert Park Circuit in Melbourne.

articles.title: What To Watch For in the season opener in Australia
articles.summary: What To Watch For in the season opener in Australia. Chris Medland picks out five key things to keep an eye on when the lights go out for the season opener at Albert Park in Melbourne.

articles.summary: What the teams said – Qualifying in Australia. The drivers and teams report back on all the action from final Practice and Qualifying in Melbourne for the 2026 Australian Grand Prix.

articles.summary: How to watch the F1 Australian Grand Prix: Saturday. Formula 1's 2026 season opener in Australia is set for tonight, for those of us in the USA. What sort of drama will the race from Melbourne deliver?

articles.title: Driver dissent surges after power unit struggles in Australian GP qualifying
articles.summary: Driver dissent surges after power unit struggles in Australian GP qualifying. Drivers are down – and not just on power – after sampling the latest breed of F1 cars in qualifying for the first time.

articles.title: Stroll permitted to start Australian Grand Prix despite not meeting 107% rule
articles.summary: Stroll permitted to start Australian Grand Prix despite not meeting 107% rule. Despite not setting a fast enough lap time to meet the 107% rule all weekend, Lance Stroll has been granted permission to race in the Australian Grand Prix.

articles.title: Russell surprised by how much rivals showed in testing after dominating Melbourne qualifying
articles.summary: Russell surprised by how much rivals showed in testing after dominating Melbourne qualifying. While many expect teams to keep their cards close to their chest in testing, George Russell is surprised that Mercedes' rivals seemingly showed their hands before the first race of the season.

articles.title: ‘The formula is just not correct’ - Verstappen maintains stance on new F1 cars following qualifying crash
articles.summary: ‘The formula is just not correct’ - Verstappen maintains stance on new F1 cars following qualifying crash. Max Verstappen once again voiced criticism of Formula 1's new cars after qualifying for the Australian Grand Prix.

articles.title: Russell leads Mercedes one-two in Australian Grand Prix qualifying as Verstappen crashes out
articles.summary: Russell leads Mercedes one-two in Australian Grand Prix qualifying as Verstappen crashes out. Mercedes dominated the first qualifying of F1's new season and new regulation era in Melbourne.

articles.title: Russell rules final free practice after Antonelli crash
articles.summary: Russell rules final free practice after Antonelli crash. Russell was 0.616s clear of Hamilton, who pipped teammate Leclerc to second place in the final minutes of the session.

articles.title: How to watch the Australian F1 Grand Prix: Friday
articles.summary: How to watch the Australian F1 Grand Prix: Friday. The opening day of practice is in the books, and there's already plenty to talk about at Formula 1's 2026 season-opener in Australia. What sort of drama will qualifying deliver? Here's how and when to tune in to find out. (All times Eastern).8:10pm:...

articles.title: Vibrations shaking the Aston Martin/Honda relationship
articles.summary: Vibrations shaking the Aston Martin/Honda relationship. The situation was clearly not good at Aston Martin heading into 2026, but just how not good became truly evident on the opening days of track running in Melbourne.

articles.title: Pace-setter Piastri expects field ‘to find a big step overnight’
articles.summary: Pace-setter Piastri expects field ‘to find a big step overnight’. Despite having set the pace in FP2, McLaren's Oscar Piastri says the competitive order at the Australian Grand Prix could change with big gains being made overnight.

articles.title: 'Perfect storm' for Russell but Norris unhappy with 'worst cars'
articles.summary: 'Perfect storm' for Russell but Norris unhappy with 'worst cars'. George Russell knew his Mercedes was fast but was surprised by just how quick. Lando Norris was not so happy after Australian Grand Prix qualifying.

articles.title: 'Huge potential' in Aston Martin, says Alonso
articles.summary: 'Huge potential' in Aston Martin, says Alonso. Fernando Alonso says there is "huge potential" in the Aston Martin car after qualifying 17th at the Australian Grand Prix.

articles.title: Russell takes Melbourne pole after Verstappen crash
articles.summary: Russell takes Melbourne pole after Verstappen crash. George Russell takes pole position as Mercedes dominate a qualifying session for the Australian Grand Prix in which Max Verstappen crashed.

articles.summary: Andrew Benson Q&A: Send us your questions. Our F1 correspondent Andrew Benson is doing a weekly Q&A this season, so get your questions in now.

articles.title: Russell 'elite' and a 'leader' - now he may have car to challenge for title
articles.summary: Russell 'elite' and a 'leader' - now he may have car to challenge for title. George Russell has had to be satisfied with proving himself against his team-mate, but he may now have a car with which he can challenge for the title.

articles.summary: All you need to know about new F1 cars. F1 has the biggest rule change in its history with engines, chassis, tyres and fuel all subject to new regulations. We look at what it all means.

articles.title: Five seconds off the pace - Aston Martin's dire situation unmasked in practice
articles.summary: Five seconds off the pace - Aston Martin's dire situation unmasked in practice. Aston Martin's dire start to the season has left Fernando Alonso in a "hard mental place", says team principal Adrian Newey.

articles.summary: McLaren's Piastri fastest on first day of F1 season. McLaren's Oscar Piastri sets the fastest time in Friday practice at the season-opening Australian Grand Prix.
